utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Let's check each one in the final package. (1) destination: Prague, Czech Republic – included and fully specified. (2) travel_dates: June 24–28, 2024 – included and specific. (3) transportation: flight details with costs – included (return flights for 4 people, Budget Airline, cost €600). (4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs – included (Family Haven Hotel, 4 nights, cost €700). (5) activities: selected activities with costs – included (3 activities, each has name and cost). (6) additional_services: included but null, so not actually specified. (7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown – included (€1570 total, currency EUR). Thus, 6 items are included and fully specified out of 7, because 'additional_services' is missing or not detailed.
